completion_summary: Machine-audited 12 declared axes and four invariance modes; passed 36 basic exploit probes; completed 240-run public seed OOD and 240-run salted private shift matrices; published fail-closed report with 4/6 tasks stable and axis controls still blocked.
scope: Implement machine-executable axis-level generalization, semantic invariance, and exploit-resistance gates for the six serious publication candidates without changing runtime physics or frozen task contracts.
